modules.name: Module 1: JS Engine, Event Loop Execution & Scope Closures

topics.title: JS Engine
subtopics: Call stack, execution contexts (creation vs execution phases), V8 heap layout, JIT compiler

topics.title: Event Loop
subtopics: Execution precedence of Call stack, Microtask Queue (Promises, queueMicrotask, MutationObserver), and Macrotask Queue (setTimeout, setInterval, setImmediate)

topics.title: Closures & Scope
subtopics: Lexical scope, scope chain lookup, closure variables retention, and memory leaks prevention

topics.title: Hoisting & Temporal Dead Zone (TDZ)
subtopics: var variable hoisting vs let/const lexical bounds, functions hoisting

topics.title: Data Types & Coercion
subtopics: Primitive vs Reference types heap mappings, implicit type conversion rules

modules.name: Module 2: Context Bindings, Prototypes & OOP Javascript

topics.title: This Context
subtopics: Default binding, implicit binding, explicit binding (call, apply, bind), arrow functions lexical this binding

topics.title: Prototypes
subtopics: Prototype inheritance chain, Object.create, constructor prototype property search overhead

topics.title: ES6 Classes
subtopics: Syntactic sugar transformations, constructor methods, inheritance super calls, private fields

topics.title: Iterators & Generators
subtopics: Iterable protocols, generator function execution suspension state (yield)

topics.title: Strict Mode & Linters
subtopics: Strict mode variable constraints, ESLint static analysis config rules

modules.name: Module 3: Asynchronous JS, Promises & Concurrent Executions

topics.title: Callbacks & Hell
subtopics: Async callback patterns, inversion of control traps, and code nesting shapes

topics.title: Promises API
subtopics: Promise lifecycle states (Pending, Fulfilled, Rejected), then/catch/finally chain propagation

topics.title: Async/Await
subtopics: Syntactic sugar over generator/promises, async error catches blockages prevention

topics.title: Concurrent Promises
subtopics: Promise.all fail-fast vs Promise.allSettled arrays, Promise.race, Promise.any

topics.title: Timers & Performance
subtopics: setTimeout scheduling deviations, requestAnimationFrame animation frame alignments

modules.name: Module 4: DOM Manipulations, Event Propagation & Optimization

topics.title: DOM Tree Operations
subtopics: Element select, node creations, insertions, styling adjustments, and fragmentation optimizations

topics.title: Event Propagation
subtopics: Event bubbling phase, and capturing phase (trickling), target elements, stopPropagation calls

topics.title: Event Delegation
subtopics: Event propagation utilization, single listener bindings on parent container

topics.title: Input Optimization
subtopics: Debouncing vs Throttling event execution triggers (scroll, search inputs)

topics.title: Browser Storage
subtopics: Cookies flags, LocalStorage quotas, SessionStorage constraints, and IndexedDB collections

modules.name: Module 5: ES Modules, Dynamic Imports & Build Optimizations

topics.title: Module Systems
subtopics: CommonJS module exports vs ES Modules static syntax (import/export), cyclic dependencies

topics.title: Dynamic Imports
subtopics: Import() function execution paths, code splitting triggers, and chunks loading

topics.title: Errors Handling
subtopics: Try-catch blocks, window.onerror globals, custom Error subclasses with stacks

topics.title: Performance Profiling
subtopics: Chrome DevTools memory allocation timeline, heap snapshots diagnostics, CPU flame charts

topics.title: Build Bundling
subtopics: Tree-shaking unused variables algorithms, code minification, Rollup/Webpack configurations
